name: @usedot/loom
description: Provider-pluggable orchestration runtime for multi-model inference pipelines.

scripts.demo: node src/cli.mjs run "Review this API route for privacy and billing bugs." --pipeline code-review --config examples/mock.config.json
scripts.test:smoke: node src/cli.mjs run "Find edge cases in a credits API." --pipeline code-review --config examples/mock.config.json --json
scripts.eval:report: node src/cli.mjs eval --dataset evals/mock-code-review.jsonl --config examples/mock.config.json --output reports/mock-eval.html
scripts.benchmark:dot:smoke: node src/cli.mjs eval --dataset evals/code-review-v1.jsonl --config examples/dot-code.config.json --strategies baseline,fixed,adaptive --limit 3 --concurrency 3 --artifacts reports/dot-code-review-smoke
scripts.benchmark:dot: node src/cli.mjs eval --dataset evals/code-review-v1.jsonl --config examples/dot-code.config.json --strategies baseline,fixed,adaptive --iterations 3 --concurrency 3 --artifacts reports/dot-code-review-v1
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run test:smoke && npm run eval:mock && npm --prefix studio run build
